faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Kips Bay?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Kips Bay typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your apartment or property, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Kips Bay apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Kips Bay apartments take 2-4 hours for the initial service. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your inspection.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Kips Bay apartment during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we bring the temperature to lethal levels. For chemical treatments, we recommend staying out for 4-6 hours to allow products to dry. Pets should also be removed during treatment, and we'll provide detailed preparation instructions.

faqs.question: Are bed bugs common in Kips Bay buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, bed bugs are common throughout Manhattan including Kips Bay due to high population density, frequent travel, and shared walls in apartment buildings. They can spread between units quickly, so early detection and professional treatment are crucial. We also offer building-wide solutions for property managers dealing with multiple infestations.
